generated_oml:
instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical thermal incubator system with styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ air volume), heatbed, fan, sensors, Raspberry Pi, PCB, and power supply"
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, HeatbedActuator, FanActuator, AmbientTemperatureSensor, InternalTemperatureSensor1, InternalTemperatureSensor2, RaspberryPi4Component, PCBComponent, PowerSupplyComponent
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ air volume"
]

instance PCBComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current handling"
]

instance PowerSupplyComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for thermal incubator system"
]

instance RaspberryPi4Component : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hardware controller"
]

instance AmbientTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring ambient temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal temperature 1 with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTemperatureDataTransmitted1
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal temperature 2 with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTemperatureDataTransmitted2
]

instance AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientTemperatureSensor
]

instance InternalTemperatureDataTransmitted1 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensor1
]

instance InternalTemperatureDataTransmitted2 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensor2
]

instance AmbientTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from ambient DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQEnabler
]

instance InternalTemperatureData1 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from internal DS18S20 sensor 1"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTemperatureDataTransmitted1
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQEnabler
]

instance InternalTemperatureData2 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from internal DS18S20 sensor 2"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTemperatureDataTransmitted2
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQEnabler
]

instance RabbitMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for transmitting sensor data to the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]

instance ScipyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package for non-linear least squares optimization and model calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService, SimulationService
]

instance RaspberryPi4Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for sensor data acquisition and actuator control"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService, ActuatorControlService
]

instance OneWireProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire communication protocol for interfacing DS18S20 sensors with Raspberry Pi"
    DTDFVocab:enables SensorDataAcquisitionService
]

instance PCBDesignToolsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PCB design tools for manufacturing MOSFET and optocoupler circuitry"
    DTDFVocab:enables PCBManufacturingService
]

instance GitHubEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub repository for open-source code storage and version control"
    DTDFVocab:enables CodeManagementService
]

instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for transmitting temperature sensor data from physical system to Digital Twin via RabbitMQ"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration of thermal models using non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibratedModelParametersInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Temperature prediction using thermal simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance BangBangControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control strategy with adjustable upper/lower limits, heating duration, and waiting duration parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides HeatbedControlAction, FanControlAction
]

instance ActuatorControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for controlling heatbed and fan actuators"
    DTDFVocab:provides HeatbedControlAction, FanControlAction
]

instance SensorDataAcquisitionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for acquiring sensor data via 1-Wire protocol"
    DTDFVocab:provides SensorDataInsight
]

instance PCBManufacturingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for PCB manufacturing using design tools"
    DTDFVocab:provides PCBManufacturingInsight
]

instance CodeManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for code management via GitHub"
    DTDFVocab:provides CodeManagementInsight
]

instance DataTransmissionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data transmission status for temperature sensors"
]

instance CalibratedModelParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated parameters for thermal models minimizing residual error"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values used for control decisions"
]

instance SensorDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Sensor data acquired via 1-Wire protocol"
]

instance PCBManufacturingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "PCB design and manufacturing status"
]

instance CodeManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Code repository status and version control"
]

instance HeatbedControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic control action for heatbed heating/cooling based on bang-bang strategy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FanControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic control action for fan activation based on bang-bang strategy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal simulation model with parameters C_air and G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal simulation model with parameters C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heating actuator with dimensions 214×214×3 mm, controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers on PCB for up to 4A current"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Air circulation actuator with 0.02 m³/s airflow, controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers on PCB"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller sends actuation commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan control) via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which executes them on hardware components using MOSFETs and optocouplers."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated components include RabbitMQ communication server, low-level driver (hardware interface), and controller (control logic), interconnected via RabbitMQ message passing for synchronization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the 'as operated' phase of the physical system, as it integrates models to monitor and simulate the deployed incubator's behavior during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validated through uniform temperature experiments (testing Assumption 1), with sensor discrepancies measured (max 7°C difference without 18V fan, reduced to 6°C with 18V fan); Model B better predicts thermal inertia of the heatbed."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between PT and DT components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and DT components (controller, low-level driver) hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "A safe protocol is implemented in the low-level driver to maintain device safety, with MOSFETs and optocouplers providing electrical isolation between control signals and high-power components."
]
